@@ -430,4 +430,5 @@
 
 Opendrap DevOps AI is a unified developer ecosystem where users can connect, collaborate, chat, deploy applications, test with AI, monitor logs, manage tasks, track bugs, generate public URLs, and work together without needing multiple separate tools.
 
 It combines the best ideas from GitHub, Discord, Jira, Postman, Playwright, Cloudflare Tunnel, and AI QA systems into one integrated platform powered by Cloudflare and AI.
+s
\ No newline at end of file

-OPENDRAP DEVOPS AI
+Implement the Agent Installation and Secure Workspace Flow for Opendrap DevOps AI.
 
-Design and build a modern developer collaboration, deployment, testing, monitoring, and AI-powered DevOps platform. The platform combines features of GitHub, Jira, Discord, Postman, Playwright, Cloudflare Tunnel, and AI QA tools into a single workspace.
+REQUIREMENTS
 
-CORE CONCEPT
+After a user logs in for the first time, immediately display a mandatory modal popup before accessing the dashboard.
 
-Opendrap is not a hosting provider. It is a developer collaboration and testing platform where users connect their own development environment (Google Cloud Shell or supported environments) using an agent.
+POPUP TITLE
 
-Every user is equal. There are no global Owner, Admin, Developer, or Tester roles. Users can search for other users, connect with them, chat, collaborate on projects, invite them into projects, assign permissions inside projects, create tasks, report bugs, deploy applications, run AI testing, and monitor applications.
+Connect Your Development Environment

-* Cloudflare Durable Objects

-* Cloudflare D1
+The install.sh script must:
 
-Storage:
+1. Create workspace folder
 
-* Backblaze B2
+~/opendev
 
-AI:
+2. Create subfolders
 
-* GLM-4.7 Flash
+~/opendev/
+‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ agent/

+‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ logs/
+‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ config/
+‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ temp/
 
-Testing:

+/

-Overview

-Terminal

-AI Testing

-Settings
+The terminal must only operate inside:
 
-TERMINAL
+~/opendev
 
-Browser-based terminal using xterm.js.
+Allowed workspace:
 
-Dashboard
-‚Üí Durable Object
-‚Üí Agent
-‚Üí Cloud Shell
+~/opendev/projects/*
+~/opendev/logs/*
+~/opendev/temp/*
 
-Supports:

-* Python

-* Linux Commands

-LOGS

-Filters:
+====================================================

-* Error
+TERMINAL BEHAVIOR
 
-Search logs.
+Terminal should automatically start inside:

+~/opendev
 
-Store:

-* Exception
-* Stack Trace
-* Request Data
-* User Data
-* Timestamp
+opendev@workspace:~/opendev$
 
-Display:

-* Error List
-* Severity
-* Frequency
-* Status
+* Python

+* Pip
+* NPM
+* Project Commands
 
-AI BUG ANALYSIS
+The terminal should feel like a normal Linux terminal but restricted to the Opendrap workspace.
 
-Input:
+====================================================
 
-* Logs
-* Tracebacks
-* Screenshots
+SETTINGS PAGE
 
-GLM generates:
+Add Agent Settings section.
 
-* Root Cause
-* Suggested Fix
-* Confidence Score
+Show:
 
-AI TESTING
+Agent Status
+Agent ID
+Workspace Path
+Cloud Shell Status
+Last Seen
 
-User enters:
+Buttons:
 
-"Test this application like a customer"
+Copy Install Command

-* Homepage Test

+# See https://opendrap-api.tert.workers.dev/api for API docs
 
-Output:
+with copy button.
 
-* Screenshots
-* Videos
-* Test Results
-* Bug Reports
+====================================================
 
\ No newline at end of file
-API LAB
+DASHBOARD STATUS
 
-Swagger + Postman style interface.
+Show:

-* GET
-* POST

-* Headers

+or

-* Title

+Run:
 
-CHAT SYSTEM

-Private Chat

-Realtime using Durable Objects.

-TEAM COLLABORATION

commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
OPENDRAP DEVOPS AI

Design and build a modern developer collaboration, deployment, testing, monitoring, and AI-powered DevOps platform. The platform combines features of GitHub, Jira, Discord, Postman, Playwright, Cloudflare Tunnel, and AI QA tools into a single workspace.

CORE CONCEPT

Opendrap is not a hosting provider. It is a developer collaboration and testing platform where users connect their own development environment (Google Cloud Shell or supported environments) using an agent.

Every user is equal. There are no global Owner, Admin, Developer, or Tester roles. Users can search for other users, connect with them, chat, collaborate on projects, invite them into projects, assign permissions inside projects, create tasks, report bugs, deploy applications, run AI testing, and monitor applications.

TECH STACK

Frontend:

* React
* TypeScript
* Tailwind CSS
* shadcn/ui
* xterm.js
* Recharts

Hosting:

* Cloudflare Pages

Backend:

* Cloudflare Workers
* TypeScript

Realtime:

* Cloudflare Durable Objects
* WebSocket

Database:

* Cloudflare D1

Storage:

* Backblaze B2

AI:

* GLM-4.7 Flash

Testing:

* Playwright

Public URLs:

* Cloudflare Tunnel

Agent:

* Python

USER FLOW

User creates account using:

* Email
* Google
* GitHub

User profile contains:

* Username
* Name
* Bio
* Skills
* Company
* Experience
* Website
* GitHub
* Projects
* Connections

Users can search globally by:

* Username
* Company Name
* Skills
* Technology
* Project Name

Users can:

* Send connection requests
* Accept or reject requests
* Start private chats
* Create group chats
* Invite users into projects

CONNECTION SYSTEM

Search User
‚Üí Open Profile
‚Üí Send Connection Request
‚Üí Accept Request
‚Üí Chat Enabled
‚Üí Project Invite Enabled

COMPANY SYSTEM

Users can create or join companies.

Company Profile:

* Company Name
* Description
* Website
* Team Members
* Projects
* Technology Stack

PROJECT FLOW

Create Project
‚Üí Connect GitHub Repository
‚Üí Install Agent
‚Üí Agent Connects to Platform
‚Üí Clone Repository
‚Üí Create Environment
‚Üí Install Requirements
‚Üí Run Application
‚Üí Generate Public URL
‚Üí Share Preview
‚Üí Test Application
‚Üí Fix Bugs
‚Üí Release

AGENT FLOW

User runs:

curl install.sh | bash

Agent installs:

~/opendrap/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ agent.py
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ config.json
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ startup.sh
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ project/

Agent connects to Cloudflare Durable Object using WebSocket.

Agent responsibilities:

* Git Clone
* Git Pull
* Branch Switch
* Create Venv
* Install Requirements
* Run Project
* Stream Logs
* Run Playwright
* Cloudflare Tunnel
* Send Screenshots
* Send Videos

DASHBOARD

Sidebar:

* Dashboard
* Projects
* Deployments
* AI Testing
* API Lab
* Logs
* Errors
* Monitoring
* Tasks
* Chat
* Connections
* Companies
* Profile
* Settings

DASHBOARD HOME

Cards:

* Total Projects
* Active Deployments
* AI Tests Run
* Open Bugs

Recent Projects:

* Name
* Status
* Branch
* URL
* Last Deployment

PROJECT PAGE

Tabs:

Overview
Deployments
Terminal
Logs
Errors
AI Testing
API Lab
Tasks
Chat
Members
Settings

TERMINAL

Browser-based terminal using xterm.js.

Dashboard
‚Üí Durable Object
‚Üí Agent
‚Üí Cloud Shell

Supports:

* Python
* Node
* Git
* Linux Commands

LOGS

Real-time log streaming.

Filters:

* Info
* Warning
* Error

Search logs.

ERROR MONITORING

Store:

* Exception
* Stack Trace
* Request Data
* User Data
* Timestamp

Display:

* Error List
* Severity
* Frequency
* Status

AI BUG ANALYSIS

Input:

* Logs
* Tracebacks
* Screenshots

GLM generates:

* Root Cause
* Suggested Fix
* Confidence Score

AI TESTING

User enters:

"Test this application like a customer"

Playwright AI executes:

* Homepage Test
* Login Test
* Registration Test
* Form Test
* API Test
* Navigation Test
* Checkout Test

Output:

* Screenshots
* Videos
* Test Results
* Bug Reports

API LAB

Swagger + Postman style interface.

Features:

* GET
* POST
* PUT
* DELETE
* Headers
* Auth
* Request Body
* Collections
* Environment Variables

TASK MANAGEMENT

Kanban Board:

Todo
In Progress
Testing
Done

Task contains:

* Title
* Description
* Assignee
* Due Date
* Priority
* Status

CHAT SYSTEM

Private Chat

Group Chat

Project Chat

Realtime using Durable Objects.

Features:

* Text
* File Sharing
* Image Sharing
* Project Mentions
* Task Mentions

BUG TRACKING

Bug contains:

* Title
* Description
* Screenshot
* Video
* Priority
* Status
* Assigned User

Statuses:

* Open
* In Progress
* Testing
* Fixed
* Closed

TEAM COLLABORATION

Project creator can invite connected users.

Permissions can be assigned per project:

* Deploy
* View Logs
* Terminal Access
* AI Testing
* Task Management
* Chat Access

DEPLOYMENT FLOW

Connect Repository
‚Üí Clone Repository
‚Üí Setup Environment
‚Üí Run Application
‚Üí Generate Cloudflare Tunnel URL
‚Üí Monitor Logs
‚Üí Run AI Tests
‚Üí Share Preview

DATABASE TABLES

Users
Companies
Connections
Projects
ProjectMembers
Tasks
Chats
Messages
Deployments
Errors
AITests
Notifications
ActivityLogs

STORAGE

D1:

* User Data
* Projects
* Tasks
* Bugs
* Connections
* Messages

Backblaze B2:

* Screenshots
* Videos
* Reports
* Log Archives

FINAL PRODUCT VISION

Opendrap DevOps AI is a unified developer ecosystem where users can connect, collaborate, chat, deploy applications, test with AI, monitor logs, manage tasks, track bugs, generate public URLs, and work together without needing multiple separate tools.

It combines the best ideas from GitHub, Discord, Jira, Postman, Playwright, Cloudflare Tunnel, and AI QA systems into one integrated platform powered by Cloudflare and AI.
